PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.description: Date-effective table storing core personal data for all persons (employees, contractors, applicants). Use EFFECTIVE_START_DATE/END_DATE filters.

PER_PERSON_NAMES_F.description: Date-effective person names. Use NAME_TYPE='GLOBAL' for the primary display name. Contains full and split name components.

PER_PERSON_NAMES_F_V.description: View on PER_PERSON_NAMES_F. Most commonly used for name queries.

PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.description: Assignment master table. Stores employee and worker assignment details (position, job, grade, org). Date-effective.

PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.description: Alternative date-effective assignment view. PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M is preferred for most queries.

HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F.description: Date-effective organization units (departments, divisions, legal entities). Filter by TYPE for specific org types.

HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F_TL.description: Translation table for HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F. Contains organisation names.

PER_JOBS_F.description: Date-effective jobs table. Stores job definitions.

PER_JOBS_F_TL.description: Translation table for PER_JOBS_F. Contains job names and descriptions.

HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F.description: Date-effective positions. Positions are specific roles within an organisation.

HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F_TL.description: Translation table for HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F. Contains position names.

PAY_PAYROLL_ACTIONS.description: Payroll processing actions (runs, prepayments, etc.). Each row is one payroll action.

PAY_ASSIGNMENT_ACTIONS.description: Assignment-level payroll actions. Child of PAY_PAYROLL_ACTIONS.

PAY_RUN_RESULTS.description: Payroll run results by element. One row per element per assignment action.

PAY_RUN_RESULT_VALUES.description: Input values for each payroll run result. Join to PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F for value names.

PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F.description: Date-effective payroll element definitions (Basic Salary, HRA, Bonus etc).

PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F.description: Input value definitions for payroll elements. Each element has one or more input values (Amount, Hours, Rate etc).

PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F.description: Element entry assignments â€” which elements are assigned to which people.

PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUES_F.description: Actual input values for element entries (e.g. the salary amount).

GL_JE_HEADERS.description: General Ledger journal entry headers. Each header is one journal batch line. Join to GL_JE_LINES for detail.

GL_JE_LINES.description: General Ledger journal entry lines. Links to GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS for account and to GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES for SLA.

GL_SL_LINK_ID.desc: SLA link ID â€” used via GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES

GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES.description: CRITICAL link table between GL_JE_LINES and XLA_AE_LINES (SLA). Required for GL-to-subledger joins.

GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS.description: Account code combinations for the Chart of Accounts. SEGMENT1-7 hold the account segments.

GL_LEDGERS.description: Ledger definitions. Each Oracle Fusion ledger has one row.

XLA_AE_HEADERS.description: Subledger Accounting (SLA) journal entry headers. Links to GL via XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_ID â†’ GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES.

XLA_AE_LINES.description: SLA journal entry lines. GL_SL_LINK_ID links back to GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES and GL_JE_LINES.

AP_INVOICES_ALL.description: AP invoice headers. One row per invoice. Use CANCELLED_DATE IS NULL for active invoices.

AP_CHECKS_ALL.description: AP payment (check/EFT/wire) headers. Each payment has one row.

RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.description: AR customer transaction headers (invoices, credit memos, debit memos). Use COMPLETE_FLAG='Y' for posted.

HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.description: TCA customer account master. Each customer can have multiple accounts. Join to HZ_PARTIES for name.

HZ_PARTIES.description: TCA party master. All suppliers, customers, contacts are parties. PARTY_TYPE distinguishes them.
